title: Mobile components re-export module
purpose: Provides a centralized export point for all mobile-specific UI components and their TypeScript types.
module_context: Exports three mobile UI components: ItemDrawer, MobilePreviewTab, and ChatTab along with their respective TypeScript interfaces.

steps.content: Export the ItemDrawer component for mobile interface usage.
Export the MobilePreviewTab component for mobile interface usage.
Export the ChatTab component for mobile interface usage.
